name: Feral Fluffy Pony
description:
A feral fluffy pony (or several) arrives at your doorstep. What do you do with them?

I do not control my hyperfixations.

Okay, so I was a dumbass with my previous bot and didn't realize that "fluffy pony foals" were, in fact, considered underage. Oops.

So here's one with grown fluffies instead! Hopefully, this fits within the guidelines much better. I've looked them over and didn't personally find anything that violates the guidelines, but I'm no expert or moderator.

Description left visible in case anyone wants to make more of these little guys. Went even crazier with the descriptions this time—trying to provide examples for several different possibilities takes a lot of tokens.

Not a lot of testing done yet, but hopefully y'all can improve this.

Deepseek recommended, but if you want to try out the other stuff, knock yourself out, I guess.
creator: AuraPhoenix1500
